notes: GitLab.com sign-in page. Clean layout with username/password form, 'Forgot your password?' link, Remember me checkbox, SSO provider buttons (Google, GitHub, Bitbucket, Salesforce), and Register tab.

endpoints.label: Login Form
endpoints.description: Username or email + password login form with Sign in button and Forgot your password? link

endpoints.label: SSO Providers
endpoints.description: Sign in with Google, GitHub, Bitbucket, and Salesforce OAuth buttons

endpoints.label: Account Links
endpoints.description: Register tab and Explore GitLab link for browsing public projects

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: OneTrust cookie consent banner with Accept/Customize buttons
